case_title: LESLEY WONG VS. LYNN WINSLOW et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-10-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL ALL OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE PAID. THE MAY-31-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-23-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST KENNETH B. TISHGART FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-23-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-08-2002. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JUL-10-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-23-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, LESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT WINSLOW, LYNN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-31-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-02-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-02-2002
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
